$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Catalog of the 19 Phase 6A-6C amendment extension surfaces.

surfaces.name: Person Graph, multi-participant
surfaces.summary: One profile per participant type per Person; multiple tenant organizations per Person; collective accounts with representative; scoped restrictions.

surfaces.name: Tiered verification
surfaces.summary: T0-T3 plus guardian-linked verification states; provider-neutral KYC adapter registry; appeals and de-dup review path.

surfaces.name: Evidence ledger hardening
surfaces.summary: Context-at-write fields; tombstone/redaction/legal-hold operations; counterparty notice events; delete/redaction/erasure/hold distinctions.

surfaces.name: Reputation interpretation service
surfaces.summary: Three-layer reputation separation; versioned interpretation; decay/confidence/exposure-floor parameters; disclosure profiles and adverse-action hooks.

surfaces.name: Communication Gateway
surfaces.summary: Cross-tenant audited channel types; guardian-mode restrictions; opt-out enforced at gateway for every channel.

surfaces.name: Configuration constraints
surfaces.summary: Canonical defaults, declared overrides, save-time combination validation, and re-baselining offer mechanism.

surfaces.name: AI proxy dual-plane
surfaces.summary: Three tenant AI states; chat/action credit metering; BYO-API consent; Gatekeeper interception for consequence-bearing actions.

surfaces.name: Foundry cross-tenant activation
surfaces.summary: Cross-tenant capability grants; tenant-activation-aware frontend chunk registration; two-phase uninstall unchanged.

surfaces.name: Marketplace transaction infrastructure
surfaces.summary: Escrow Saga primitives; platform-fee line item; multi-currency support; high-value flag in billing objects.

surfaces.name: Payout rails
surfaces.summary: Provider-neutral payout adapters; per-market capability matrix; payout failures recorded without reputation consequence.

surfaces.name: Cross-tenant invoicing
surfaces.summary: Tenant-to-tenant and tenant-to-freelancer invoicing with evidence linkage and invoice immutability.

surfaces.name: Billing honesty surfaces
surfaces.summary: AI cost surfacing in tenant billing UI and bond ledger objects as segregated refundable balances.

surfaces.name: Pricing presentations
surfaces.summary: Multiple pricing presentations; consumption honesty; FX gain/loss remains Phase 6B scope.

surfaces.name: Workspace-level working copy
surfaces.summary: Workspace ownership types; role-scoped access; transfer as permission change with snapshots and milestone manifests.

surfaces.name: Structured agreements
surfaces.summary: Objective/subjective criteria flags; criteria library; zero-objective warning; IP terms and agreement-clarity markers.

surfaces.name: AI verification hooks
surfaces.summary: Shadow-advisory accounting; confidence gate; exclusions; auto-acceptance notice ladder; scope-narrowing triggers.

surfaces.name: Employment to reputation linkage
surfaces.summary: Employment records emit evidence to three-layer reputation; anti-retaliation meta-pattern instrumentation; crossing disabled by default.

surfaces.name: Dispute and appeals scaffolding
surfaces.summary: Appeal ladder hooks; pre-panel irreversibility bar; power-imbalance patterns as flags to review, never auto-consequence.

surfaces.name: Cross-tenant scheduling and recruitment
surfaces.summary: Gateway-mediated cross-tenant availability and recruitment through disclosure profiles only.
